account.title: Settings
account.subtitle: Notifications, time zone and data management
account.gdpr.exportDesc: (GDPR Article 20): get all your data in JSON format. Includes profile, products, metrics, events and alerts. Marketplace API keys are not included in the export.
account.gdpr.deleteDesc: (GDPR Article 17): irreversibly deletes all data. Backups are wiped within 30 days. Billing records are kept for 7 years (tax law requirement).
account.actions.exportDesc: Download all your data in JSON per GDPR Article 20 (data portability).
account.actions.dangerDesc: Irreversibly deletes all your data: profile, products, metrics, history. This action cannot be undone.
account.notif.title: Notifications and time zone
account.notif.tzHint: For example UTC+4 (MSK+1), UTC+5 (MSK+2) and so on. Default is UTC+3 (Moscow).
account.notif.emailDesc: Receive a summary warehouse report by email every morning in the selected time zone.
account.notif.tgDesc: Receive a summary report in Telegram every morning. Connect the bot in the dashboard.
